title: Hugo's Garden Year
synopsis: Hugo learns about the seasons by watching his school garden change throughout the year, from spring planting to winter snow.

chapters.title: Spring and Summer in the Garden

pages.text: Hugo loves his school garden. In spring, he plants tiny seeds in the soft brown dirt. The sun is warm and gentle.

illustration.description: A young boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes kneeling in a school garden, planting seeds in spring soil with tender green shoots emerging, surrounded by soft pastel spring colors
illustration.alt: Hugo planting seeds in the spring garden

pages.text: Green leaves grow tall! Hugo waters them every day. Yellow flowers bloom in the bright summer sun. Bees buzz and butterflies dance.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes watering tall green plants with yellow flowers in the same garden scene, now filled with bright summer colors, bees and butterflies flying around
illustration.alt: Hugo watering plants in the summer garden

pages.text: Hugo picks red tomatoes and orange carrots. Summer vegetables are ready to eat! He shares them with his friends at snack time.

illustration.description: A child with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding a basket of red tomatoes and orange carrots in the same garden location, with summer bright colors and abundant vegetables growing

pages.text: Fall comes to the garden. Hugo rakes golden and red leaves. The air feels cool and crisp. Pumpkins grow big and round.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes raking colorful autumn leaves in the same garden setting, now showing warm autumn colors with orange pumpkins and golden-red falling leaves
illustration.alt: Hugo raking leaves in the autumn garden

pages.text: Winter covers the garden with white snow. Hugo looks out the classroom window. The garden sleeps under its snowy blanket.

illustration.description: A child with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes looking through a school window at the same garden scene, now covered in white snow with cool winter colors and bare trees
illustration.alt: Hugo viewing the winter garden through a window

pages.text: Soon spring will come again! Hugo draws pictures of his garden. He can't wait to plant new seeds and watch them grow.

illustration.description: A young boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes drawing at a table, with his seasonal garden drawings showing the same scene transitioning through all four seasons in a circular pattern around him
illustration.alt: Hugo drawing his garden through all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Hugo plant in spring?
questions.explanation: Hugo plants tiny seeds in the soft brown dirt during spring.

questions.question: What vegetables does Hugo pick in summer?
questions.explanation: Hugo picks red tomatoes and orange carrots when they're ready in summer.

questions.question: What does Hugo rake in fall?
questions.explanation: Hugo rakes the golden and red leaves that fall during autumn.

questions.question: What covers the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: White snow covers the garden like a blanket during winter.
